name: HDFC Bank Document Intelligence Pipeline
scenario: HDFC Bank processes 50,000 loan documents daily. Build an AI-powered pipeline that classifies each document type, extracts structured data with confidence scoring, gates low-confidence extractions to human review, and routes support tickets to the right team.

core.description: SalarySlipExtract record: applicantName, employer, monthlyGrossIncomePaise, employmentDate, extractionConfidence. isHighConfidence() returns confidence >= 70.
SalarySlipExtractor @Service: BeanOutputConverter<SalarySlipExtract>, ChatClient with extraction system prompt (temp=0, paise conversion). extract(text) + extractSafe(text) → Optional.
DocumentClassifier @Service: rule-based (keyword matching). classify(text) → DocType enum (SALARY_SLIP, BANK_STATEMENT, ID_PROOF, INVOICE, UNKNOWN).
SupportTicketClassifier @Service: BeanOutputConverter<TicketClassification>. TicketClassification: category (TicketCategory enum), urgency (1-5), requiresHuman (urgency>=4).
DocumentValidationService @Service: isValid(ExtractionResult) → checks confidence >= 70 AND required fields present per DocType.
@SpringBootTest (4 tests): salary slip classified correctly, high-confidence extract present, low-confidence extract empty, fraud ticket has urgency=5. All 4 pass.

bonus.description: BatchDocumentProcessor: process List<SlipText> in parallel with virtual threads. Returns BatchResult(highConfidence, reviewQueue). Test: total = high + review.
DocumentSummarizer @Service: system prompt 'exactly 3 bullets, max 25 words each'. SummaryResult record with bullets List<String>. BeanOutputConverter. Test: schema contains 'bullets'.
Fallback classifier: if AI throws exception → rule-based RuleBasedTicketClassifier used automatically. Test: fallback activated + returns valid category.

ai_policy_explanation: 5 hints. BeanOutputConverter.getFormat(): ALWAYS include this as a .param() in the user message. Without it the AI doesn't know what JSON schema to produce. Temperature=0.0: set in application.yml for extraction — deterministic output means same document always produces same extraction. Confidence threshold: use >= 70 for Optional.of(), < 70 for Optional.empty(). Amounts in paise: ₹85,000 = 8,500,000 paise (long). Never use double for money — precision loss. extractSafe returns Optional: caller must handle the empty case (route to human review queue), never unwrap without checking.
